description: You are a Business Intelligence Analyst. Transform the normalized Sakila OLTP database into a star-schema data mart named 'sakila_mart' for analytical reporting using MySQL Workbench (localhost, user: ga, password: password123). The 'sakila_mart' database must include a 'dim_date' table for 2005-01-01 through 2006-12-31 (columns: date_key INT YYYYMMDD, full_date, year, quarter, month, month_name, day, day_of_week, day_name, is_weekend), a 'dim_customer' table (columns: customer_key, first_name, last_name, email, address, district, city, country, active), a 'dim_film' table (columns: film_key, title, description, release_year, language, category, rental_rate, length, rating), and a 'dim_store' table (columns: store_key, manager_first_name, manager_last_name, address, district, city, country). The 'fact_rental' table (columns: rental_key, date_key, customer_key, film_key, store_key, rental_duration_days, payment_amount) should have its date_key derived from the rental_date. The data mart must also feature a view 'v_monthly_store_performance' aggregating revenue and rentals by year, month, and store (columns: year, month, month_name, store_key, store_city, total_rentals, total_revenue, avg_rental_duration, unique_customers). Export the results of this view to /home/ga/Documents/exports/monthly_store_performance.csv.
